ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plate */,
  "plate_name" TEXT /* Name of the plate */,
  "plate_type" TEXT /* Type of the plate (e.g., 96-well, 384-well) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plate */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the plate */,
  "date_of_manufacture" TEXT /* Date the plate was manufactured */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the plate */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended storage conditions for the plate */,
  "number_of_wells" INTEGER /* Number of wells in the plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate the well belongs to */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well (e.g., 1a, 2a) */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row number of the well */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column number of the well */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of liquid in the well (in µL) */,
  "reagent" TEXT /* Reagent used in the well */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the reagent (in µM) */,
  "initial_measurement" REAL /* Initial measurement before the experiment starts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Project ID linked to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_points" (
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the time point belongs to */,
  "time_point_name" TEXT /* Name of the time point (e.g., 0 min, 30 min) */,
  "time" REAL /* Time value of the time point (in minutes) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of time (e.g., minutes, hours, days) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assay_data" (
  "assay_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the assay data belongs to */,
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time point the assay data belongs to */,
  "avg" REAL /* Average value of the assay data */,
  "stdev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the assay data */,
  "tx" REAL /* TX value of the assay data */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., absorbance, fluorescence) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement (e.g., ELISA, qPCR) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., OD, RFU) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes for any additional information about the assay data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_data_time_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_point_id") REFERENCES time_points ("time_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percent_closed" (
  "percent_closed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage closed value */,
  "assay_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay data the percentage closed value belongs to */,
  "percent_closed" REAL /* Percentage closed value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the percentage closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percent_closed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percent_closed_assay_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_data_id") REFERENCES assay_data ("assay_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auc_values" (
  "auc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AUC value */,
  "assay_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay data the AUC value belongs to */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the AUC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auc_values_assay_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_data_id") REFERENCES assay_data ("assay_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, lab manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assay_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assay data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assay_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_data_id") REFERENCES assay_data ("assay_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
